title: taraxacum cyrtolobum
intro: Taraxacum cyrtolobum, also known as the upright dandelion or narrow-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cyrtolobum include its potential to support liver function, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of arthritis. Taraxacum cyrtolobum can be consumed as a herbal tea, made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or taken as a capsule supplement after consulting a healthcare professional.
